arts.ttl: Torino in Talks with Inter for Buchanan Loan Deal
arts.sum: Torino are working to strengthen their squad under manager Ivan Vanoli for the second half of the season, with Inter Milan's Tajon Buchanan emerging as a prime target for their wide positions. The post Torino in Talks with Inter for Buchanan Loan Deal appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Ange Postecoglou's side 'set their sights' on signing 'irreplaceable' Inter Milan star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur set their sights on signing an 'irreplaceable' Inter Milan player this summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Sparta Prague v Inter Milan: Match Preview
arts.sum: The UEFA Champions League resumes this Wednesday with a crucial encounter between Sparta Prague and Inter Milan at the epet ARENA in Prague. This matchday 7 fixture could prove decisive for both teams as they pursue their European ambitions. The post Champions League | Sparta Prague v Inter Milan: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Sparta Prague play their first competitive game in over a month and they'll look to build upon a run of three wins in their last four. That said, they have lost their last four in the Champions League...

arts.ttl: Inter Milan to Challenge AC Milan for Torino Talent Samuele Ricci
arts.sum: Samuele Ricci has emerged as one of the top Italian midfielders in Serie A, attracting attention from major clubs. The 23-year-old recently celebrated his 100th appearance for Torino, showcasing his growth into a versatile and quality midfielder over the past three years. arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages
